title.en: Twisty Puzzle Visualizer 异形魔方可视化

content.en:
Twisty Puzzle Visualizer 异形魔方可视化

Images sourced from http://cubiclealgdbimagegen.azurewebsites.net

alg = algorithm to apply 公式应用 = scramble 打乱

case = algorithm to solve case应用公式后复原 = algorithm 公式

Megaminx

Pyraminx

cubiclealgdbimagegen.azurewebsites.net/generator?puzzle=mega&alg=RUR'URU2'R'

cubiclealgdbimagegen.azurewebsites.net/generator?puzzle=pyra

Skewb

Kilominx

cubiclealgdbimagegen.azurewebsites.net/generator?puzzle=skewb&alg=r'RrR'

cubiclealgdbimagegen.azurewebsites.net/generator?puzzle=kilo&alg=RUR'U'R'FR2U'R'U'RUR'F'

SQ1

Assume yellow on U, orange on F in solved case. In order to assume yellow on U, red on F in solved case, code of case (alg) needs to be added 6,6 at last (first).

默认复原状态下黄顶橙前。为了改成黄顶红前，case（alg）代码中公式的最后（前面）要加上6,6.

EP

CSP

cubiclealgdbimagegen.azurewebsites.net/generator?&puzzle=sq1&case=1,0/0,3/-1,-1/1,-2/-1,0

https://wol4rwwr5d.execute-api.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/default/get_image?alg=

cubiclealgdbimagegen.azurewebsites.net/generator?&puzzle=sq1&alg=3,-1/1,-2/-1,-4/1,-2/2,0/-3,-3/3,0/-1,-5/-4,-2/6,0
